subject: docs(pwa): add Chrome Android install prompt fix to CLAUDE.md
body:
Documents manifest fixes (explicit id field, explicit purpose: 'any' on
icons, prefer_related_applications: false) and diagnostic logging pattern
for debugging beforeinstallprompt failures on Chrome Android.
